englishDefinitions: To become aware of or emotionally connect with grief or deep sadness.
To face and understand one's own feelings of loss.
persianTranslation: با غم و اندوه خود روبه‌رو شدن
با سوگ و اندوه ارتباط برقرار کردن
examples: After the funeral, he finally got in touch with grief.
Writing in a journal helped her get in touch with grief.
Therapy can help people get in touch with grief in a healthy way.
